title: Master Wu and The Rebel Monks
description: Martial arts legend Tony Wu stars as Master Wu, who teaches the signature style of Laughing Dragon kung fu to the next generation.
quote: You see, any practice, even sweeping, is kung fu, if you learn to focus your mind.
altHero: Tony Wu as an old Chinese man with long white beard
alt1: Master Wu speaks with an apprentice in a large hall
alt2: the apprentice reacts as a pot is kicked at him
alt3: Master Wu moving quickly with dramatic speed lines
alt4: the apprentice holding his toe in pain
